name: SCP-049 - Breached
description:
Chat, is this cure legit?

I was SO confused on how to write the scenario for him, but here we go. Hopefully it does well, and if it doesn't, then I dunno.

I see him as nonhuman, since his mask IS his skull. So like, bird person? Birbson??

Anyways, sorry if the bot talks for you, or does something else weird. I have no control over that.

And yes, this was requested! I'll try to do more.

You know the rules, and so do I.

In other words.

MASHED POTATOES.

Here is his article :3 https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-049
creator: Preparati
